claim_map.claim_text: Hermes Agent can be cited narrowly as a Nous Research open-source agent project whose supplied public project and documentation metadata support tool-using automation workflow use.

forbidden_claims_checked.forbidden_claim: Hermes Agent is a runtime dependency of OpenClaw.
Hermes Agent is the general operating environment for OpenClaw.
OpenClaw requires Hermes Agent for web access or phone access.
Hermes Agent proves a settled industry transition from prompting to autonomous loops.
All agent projects support the same automation model as Hermes Agent.
The supplied source titles or raw text may be copied directly into book prose.

findings.finding: The packet includes all required fields and a single substantive candidate.
Every proposed claim has evidence_refs and citation_keys, and each citation key is defined in citation_map.
The selected candidate has strong supplied evidence, three source identifiers, no detected contradiction, and allowed_for_author status.
The target file is an allowed substantive canary location.

publish_packets.proposed_markdown_delta: A narrow example is Hermes Agent: in the supplied public project and documentation metadata, it is supported as a Nous Research open-source agent project with materials that describe tool-using automation workflows. [run44-hermes-agent-project]

publication_readiness.reason: The packet is limited to one strong supplied candidate, uses public metadata-only evidence identifiers, includes caveats and forbidden-claim checks, and avoids raw text copying or unsupported broad claims.

findings.finding: The proposed canary uses one supplied existing evidence candidate and does not introduce external collection.
The prose is narrow and does not promote OpenClaw/Hermes adjacency into dependency, runtime, access, or operating-environment claims.
The proposed delta paraphrases the supported point and avoids raw text reproduction.
The citation key maps directly to the selected claim and all supporting evidence references.

required_caveats: Use the claim only as a narrow example of a public open-source agent project with tool-using automation workflow support in the supplied metadata.
Do not state or imply that Hermes Agent is required by OpenClaw.
Do not state or imply that Hermes Agent is the general runtime, dependency, operating environment, web access layer, or phone access layer for OpenClaw.
Do not use this canary to make broad claims about the whole agent market or the settled direction of the industry.
publish_packets.source_quality_summary: The selected claim is the strongest supplied candidate by evidence strength and selection score. It has three supplied public metadata sources with A/B quality, no detected contradiction, and an allowed_for_author publication decision. The packet uses only the supplied candidate and source identifiers, paraphrases the claim narrowly, and avoids raw source text reproduction or broader architectural claims.
publish_packets.summary: A single narrow canary is safe to propose from the supplied evidence candidates: Hermes Agent may be described as a Nous Research open-source agent project whose public materials support tool-using automation workflows. The packet does not claim that Hermes is required by OpenClaw, does not generalize to the agent market, and does not rely on raw source text reproduction.
publish_packets.title: Run 44 guarded canary: Hermes Agent as a cited example of an open-source tool-using agent project
